requested_decision.architecture_scope: Local VS2 security slice: Postgres RLS tenant isolation, OPA/Rego policy control plane, and default egress deny under the frozen scenario contract.
requested_decision.dependency_decision: pending owner decision for local PostgreSQL, OPA/Rego, and controlled local egress harness dependencies
requested_decision.local_boundary: local/on-prem deterministic proof only; no production, live-provider, penetration-test, or human-accepted claim
requested_decision.migration_scope: non-production local compatibility path only; no production or destructive migration is approved by this package
requested_decision.security_owner: JiYong/Tars or explicitly delegated security owner

required_human_record.required_evidence: Dated APPROVE/REJECT record with approved scope, exceptions, rollback owner, dependency decision, and security ownership.
